assertions.assertion: outputs/claude-md-result.md preserves the existing Security Configuration section with Product Lifecycle, Version Streams, and Source Repositories unchanged
assertions.evidence: Security Configuration section present at lines 42-63 with all three subsections intact: Product Lifecycle (product pages URL, Jira version prefix, vulnerability issue type ID, component label pattern, VEX justification custom field), Version Streams (2.1.x stream), and Source Repositories (backend, frontend-ui).

assertions.assertion: outputs/discovery-log.md reports that Security Configuration is already fully configured or up to date
assertions.evidence: Discovery log states: 'Already fully configured with all subsections' and lists all three subsections as populated. Concludes with 'No opt-in prompt required. Security Configuration is already present and fully populated.'

assertions.assertion: outputs/changes-log.md indicates Security Configuration was preserved with no changes needed
assertions.evidence: Changes log table shows Security Configuration status as 'Up to date' with action 'Preserved unchanged'. Details section states: 'All subsections (Product Lifecycle, Version Streams, Source Repositories) already fully populated. Preserved as-is with no modifications.'

assertions.assertion: The skill does NOT offer the Security Configuration opt-in prompt — it detects the section already exists and is fully populated (idempotency skip)
assertions.evidence: Discovery log explicitly states 'No opt-in prompt required. Security Configuration is already present and fully populated.' No evidence of an opt-in prompt being offered in either the discovery-log or changes-log.

assertions.assertion: outputs/claude-md-result.md preserves all existing Repository Registry entries (backend and frontend-ui) unchanged
assertions.evidence: Repository Registry table at lines 12-14 contains both original entries: 'backend | Rust backend service | serena_backend | /home/user/backend' and 'frontend-ui | TypeScript frontend | serena_ui | /home/user/frontend-ui'.

assertions.assertion: outputs/claude-md-result.md preserves all existing Jira Configuration fields unchanged
assertions.evidence: Jira Configuration at lines 18-22 preserves all five fields: Project key TC, Cloud ID 2b9e35e3-6bd3-4cec-b838-f4249ee02432, Feature issue type ID 10142, Git Pull Request custom field customfield_10875, GitHub Issue custom field customfield_10747.
